name: ASUS PRIME H810M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel Gigabit LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS PRIME H810M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: ASUS PRIME H810M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 4.0, DDR5-6400, and Wi-Fi 6 for Intel LGA 1851.
